items.name: Sunfish
items.howToGet: Catch in rivers from 6am to 7pm in spring or summer during sunny weather.

items.name: Catfish
items.howToGet: Catch in rivers or Secret Woods from 6am to midnight in spring or fall while it is raining.

items.name: Shad
items.howToGet: Catch in rivers from 9am to 2am in spring, summer, or fall while it is raining.

items.name: Tiger Trout
items.howToGet: Catch in rivers from 6am to 7pm in fall or winter.

items.name: Largemouth Bass
items.howToGet: Catch in the Mountain Lake from 6am to 7pm in any season.

items.name: Carp
items.howToGet: Catch in the Mountain Lake in spring, summer, or fall, or in the Secret Woods and Sewer year-round.

items.name: Bullhead
items.howToGet: Catch in the Mountain Lake at any time in any season.

items.name: Sturgeon
items.howToGet: Catch in the Mountain Lake from 6am to 7pm in summer or winter.

items.name: Sardine
items.howToGet: Catch in the ocean from 6am to 7pm in spring, fall, or winter.

items.name: Tuna
items.howToGet: Catch in the ocean from 6am to 7pm in summer or winter.

items.name: Red Snapper
items.howToGet: Catch in the ocean from 6am to 7pm in summer or fall while it is raining.

items.name: Tilapia
items.howToGet: Catch in the ocean from 6am to 2pm in summer or fall.

items.name: Walleye
items.howToGet: Catch in rivers, the Mountain Lake, or the Cindersap Forest pond from 12pm to 2am in fall while it is raining.

items.name: Bream
items.howToGet: Catch in rivers from 6pm to 2am in any season.

items.name: Eel
items.howToGet: Catch in the ocean from 4pm to 2am in spring or fall while it is raining.

items.name: Lobster
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot placed in the ocean.

items.name: Crayfish
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot placed in fresh water.

items.name: Crab
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot in the ocean, or as a drop from Rock and Lava Crabs in the Mines.

items.name: Cockle
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot in the ocean, or by foraging on the beach.

items.name: Mussel
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot in the ocean, or by foraging on the beach.

items.name: Shrimp
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot placed in the ocean.

items.name: Snail
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot placed in fresh water.

items.name: Periwinkle
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot placed in fresh water.

items.name: Oyster
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot in the ocean, or by foraging on the beach.

items.name: Clam
items.howToGet: Catch with a crab pot in the ocean, or by foraging on the beach.

items.name: Pufferfish
items.howToGet: Catch in the ocean from 12pm to 4pm in summer during sunny weather.

items.name: Ghostfish
items.howToGet: Catch in the ponds on Mines floors 20 and 60, or as a drop from Ghosts.

items.name: Sandfish
items.howToGet: Catch in the Desert pond from 6am to 8pm in any season.

items.name: Woodskip
items.howToGet: Catch in the Secret Woods pond at any time in any season.

items.name: Copper Bar
items.howToGet: Smelt Copper Ore in a Furnace with coal.

items.name: Iron Bar
items.howToGet: Smelt Iron Ore in a Furnace with coal.

items.name: Gold Bar
items.howToGet: Smelt Gold Ore in a Furnace with coal.

items.name: Quartz
items.howToGet: Forage on any floor of The Mines.

items.name: Earth Crystal
items.howToGet: Forage floors 1-39 of The Mines, crack geodes, or kill Duggies.

items.name: Frozen Tear
items.howToGet: Forage floors 41-79 of The Mines, crack Frozen Geodes, or kill Dust Sprites.

items.name: Fire Quartz
items.howToGet: Forage floors 81-119 of The Mines or crack Magma Geodes.

items.name: Slime
items.howToGet: Dropped by Slimes in The Mines and Skull Cavern.

items.name: Bat Wing
items.howToGet: Dropped by Bats in The Mines or the Skull Cavern.

items.name: Solar Essence
items.howToGet: Dropped by Ghosts, Squid Kids, Metal Heads, or Mummies.

items.name: Void Essence
items.howToGet: Dropped by Shadow Brutes, Shadow Shamans, or Serpents.

items.name: Maple Syrup
items.howToGet: Tap a Maple Tree with a Tapper and collect the syrup.

items.name: Fiddlehead Fern
items.howToGet: Forage in the Secret Woods during Summer, or on Skull Cavern prehistoric floors.

items.name: Truffle
items.howToGet: Found by Pigs foraging outdoors on non-winter days.

items.name: Poppy
items.howToGet: Grow from Poppy Seeds during Summer.

items.name: Maki Roll
items.howToGet: Cook from the recipe learned via the Queen of Sauce or bought at the Saloon.

items.name: Fried Egg
items.howToGet: Cook an Egg using the starter Fried Egg recipe.

items.name: Red Mushroom
items.howToGet: Forage in the Mines, or the Secret Woods during Summer or Fall.

items.name: Sea Urchin
items.howToGet: Forage on the right side of the Beach after repairing the bridge.

items.name: Sunflower
items.howToGet: Grow from Sunflower Seeds during Summer or Fall.

items.name: Duck Feather
items.howToGet: Produced occasionally by Ducks in a Coop.

items.name: Aquamarine
items.howToGet: Break Aquamarine Nodes in the Mines or crack open Frozen Geodes.

items.name: Red Cabbage
items.howToGet: Grow from Red Cabbage Seeds during Summer.

items.name: Purple Mushroom
items.howToGet: Forage on deeper Mines floors or in the Skull Cavern.

items.name: Nautilus Shell
items.howToGet: Forage along the Beach during Winter.

items.name: Chub
items.howToGet: Catch in the mountain lake or river any season, any time.

items.name: Frozen Geode
items.howToGet: Break geode nodes or dig up on Mines floors 41-79.

items.name: Wheat
items.howToGet: Grow from Wheat Seeds during Summer or Fall.

items.name: Hay
items.howToGet: Buy from Marnie's Ranch or the Desert Trader, or cut grass with a Scythe while a Silo is built.

items.name: Apple
items.howToGet: Harvest from a mature Apple Tree during Fall.

items.name: Oak Resin
items.howToGet: Tap an Oak Tree with a Tapper and collect the resin.

items.name: Wine
items.howToGet: Place any fruit in a Keg and wait for it to ferment.

items.name: Rabbit's Foot
items.howToGet: Produced by Rabbits, most often at high friendship.

items.name: Pomegranate
items.howToGet: Harvest from a mature Pomegranate Tree during Fall.
